Why most people never start

You Didn't Quit
Because of
the Cold.

Most people who want to do cold therapy never actually start.

Not because they don't believe in it. They've read the research. They've watched the videos. They know what it does to recovery, to sleep, to the way a morning feels when it starts with something hard already done.

They don't start because every option available to them has a problem.

Cold showers work up to a point. Then your body figures out it can breathe through thirty seconds of discomfort and move on. No real adaptation. Just slightly cold before work.

The gym ice bath is shared, cleaned whenever someone gets around to it, and available only when the gym is open — which is never at 5:30am on a Tuesday when you actually want to use it.

The inflatable from Amazon held its temperature for about three weeks before it quietly became a garden ornament.

Every brand worth buying ships from the US. Six to ten weeks. One-year warranty. A support line eight thousand kilometres away. You've probably looked at them. You probably know what happens when something breaks at month fourteen.

You're not looking to try cold therapy. You already believe in it. You're looking for a setup you can trust to be there every morning for the next five years.

That's the only thing COLDCORE is built to be.

The process

From Order to
Cold Water.
Here's Exactly
What Happens.

We've removed every step between deciding and plunging. From the moment you order to the moment you get in — we handle it all.

Order & We Handle the Rest

Choose your model. We confirm your delivery window — typically within the same week for Perth metro. You don't need to arrange a plumber, an electrician, or anything else. We take care of everything from the moment you order.

We Deliver and Install

Our local team brings the unit to your home and sets it up completely. We fill it, connect it, and run it through a full check before we leave. By the time we're done, your COLDCORE is cold and ready. You don't lift anything.

Set Your Temperature

Open the app. Set your target — 3°C for the PRO, 6°C for the ENTRY. Schedule a pre-chill so it's ready when your alarm goes off. The unit runs quietly through the night, and the water is exactly where you set it by morning.

Get In

That's the whole step. Thirty seconds. The first one is the hardest. Everything after that gets slightly more manageable. The data in the app will show you exactly how much — which is the thing that keeps most people coming back.

How it works differently

Every Decision
We've Made Comes
Back to One
Moment.

The brands that get cold therapy right don't sell you on the benefits. You already know the benefits. They build the conditions that make those benefits accessible every morning. This is how COLDCORE does that.

01

Temperature That Doesn't Move

Set 3°C and it holds 3°C. Not approximately. Not on a calm morning with no sun. Every session, same temperature, same starting point. When the cold is consistent, your nervous system learns to meet it. That predictability is what turns eight seconds into three minutes — and it happens faster than you expect.

The first 30 seconds need one thing above everything else. Certainty.
02

Water You Don't Think About

Ozone and UV-C filtration run automatically between every session. The water is clean, clear, and odorless every time you open the lid. This sounds minor until you realise how many sessions people skip because something about the water felt off. We remove that friction completely. You open the lid. You get in.

Everything that gives you a reason to hesitate gets removed.
03

Ready Before You Wake Up

Set your target temperature from your phone the night before. The PRO pre-chills while you sleep and hits 3°C before your alarm goes off. The gap between wanting to plunge and actually plunging is where most habits die. We close that gap to almost nothing. By the time you're standing next to it, the decision is already made.

By the time you're standing next to it, the decision is already made.
04

A Team That's Here

We're based in Perth. We stock in Perth. We deliver and install in Perth. When something needs attention, we come to you. Not because it's good customer service. Because when the setup fails, the habit fails with it. Keeping your unit running is how we keep you in those first 30 seconds every morning for years.

The warranty means someone shows up. Not someone emails back.
05

Data That Keeps You Honest

The app logs every session. Time, temperature, frequency. After two weeks, you have a record. After two months, you have proof. Watching your sessions get longer and the gaps between them get shorter is the thing that turns a practice into something you protect.

Numbers don't let you lie to yourself about whether you're doing the work.
The lineup

Two Ways In.
One Standard.

Both models are built to the same quality, covered by the same 3-year warranty, and delivered and installed by the same local team. The question is where you want to start.

Most Popular
COLDCORE PRO
Our Flagship · From $6,990 or 12 months interest-free

The complete setup. DC inverter chiller that cools to 3°C and holds it through a Perth summer. Ozone and UV-C filtration. App control with pre-chill scheduling. Acrylic shell, stainless steel frame, outdoor rated, quiet enough that you forget it's running.


The PRO removes every variable that could give you a reason to get out before those first 30 seconds are done. Temperature is locked. Water is clean. It's ready before you are. All that's left is the cold itself.


Free delivery and installation, Perth metro. Accessory bundle included during the launch period. $300 off your first order at checkout.

COLDCORE ENTRY
Starting Point · From $3,990 or 12 months interest-free

The same principle at a different entry point. The ENTRY holds 6°C — well within the range every serious cold therapy protocol calls for. The shock is real. The adaptation is real. The habit you build is exactly the same one PRO customers build.


Most people who start here upgrade when they're ready to go deeper — not because the ENTRY wasn't enough, but because they got serious about the practice and wanted more. Both paths lead to the same place. The only wrong move is not starting.


Same 3-year warranty. Same delivery and install. $300 off your first order at checkout.

30
Day guarantee

Use It Every Morning
For 30 Days. If Nothing
Changes, We'll Come
Get It. Free.

That's the full offer. No conditions hidden further down.

Thirty days of daily use. If you don't feel something shift in your recovery, your sleep, or the way your mornings start — call us. We arrange free pickup from your home and process a full refund. One phone call. No forms. No argument about whether you qualify.

We offer this because we know what thirty days does. The people who get in on day one come back on day two. Not because they're tougher than you. Because the first 30 seconds get slightly more manageable every single time, and that shift compounds into something they'd never give up.

The hard part isn't the cold. It's building a setup that gives you no reason to skip. That's what COLDCORE is. That's the only thing it's trying to be.

Before you order

A Few
Things
Worth
Knowing.

No. We deliver, we set it up, and we make sure everything is running before we leave. By the time the team is gone, you're ready to plunge that evening. You don't organise anything else.
Six degrees is genuinely cold. The research on cold therapy benefits points to between 4°C and 10°C for most protocols. The first 30 seconds at 6°C are not comfortable. That's exactly the point. The shock is real. The adaptation is real. The habit you build is the same one PRO customers build.
You call the local number, and we come to you. Perth team, Perth response time. No international queue, no six weeks of emails. The 3-year warranty is written into your purchase agreement, and it means exactly what it says.
Yes. The DC inverter chiller is built specifically to maintain temperature under high ambient heat. Perth summer was a design consideration, not an afterthought.
The customers who worried most about this are consistently the most consistent. Once the first ten days are done, the question changes. It stops being will I use it and starts being what did I do before I had it. The 30-day guarantee exists so this risk is ours, not yours.
Zero interest for 12 months through our finance partner. You start using COLDCORE immediately and pay it off over the year. Most people find the value is obvious well before the payments are halfway done. Exact terms confirmed at checkout.
